name: multi-step-fail-fast
description: Demonstrates the multi-step envelope. Step A passes. Step B deliberately fails with a non-zero exit. Step C is never run because step B failed. Because a step failed, the assertions array in the envelope is empty by design (assertions only run when every step passes). The envelope.failure.stage is 'step' and failure.id is 'step-b-fail'. Use this when authoring a new plan to confirm your understanding of envelope.failure semantics.
